title: Add qms-workflow-engine submodule under formal change control

comment:
QA Pre-Review — CR-109 v0.1

DETERMINATION: NON-COMPLIANT — Request Updates

VERIFIED ITEMS (PASS):
- Frontmatter: title = "Add qms-workflow-engine submodule under formal change control" (present, non-empty)
- Frontmatter: revision_summary = "Initial draft" (present; acceptable for v0.1)
- All required CR sections present (1-12)
- No prohibited placeholder content (TBD/TODO/FIXME/XXX) in pre-approved sections
- Current state accurately reflects four existing submodules (verified against .gitmodules: flow-state, qms-cli, claude-qms, Quality-Manual)
- Scope is well-defined with clear independence guarantee (Section 5.3)
- Implementation Plan and EI table are consistent (6 steps, 6 EIs, 1:1 correspondence)
- Testing summary is adequate for infrastructure-only CR (procedural verification)
- VR flags correctly absent (no behavioral changes)
- References are relevant and accurate (SOP-001, SOP-002, SOP-005, CR-030, CR-108)
- Formatting consistent throughout; no typos found

FINDING (requires correction):

Finding 1 — Internal Inconsistency (Section 2.3 vs. Section 7.2 vs. EI-4): Section 2.3 "Files Affected" lists only ".gitmodules" and "qms-workflow-engine/". However, Section 7.2 "Documents Affected" identifies CLAUDE.md as requiring modification, and EI-4 explicitly plans to "Update CLAUDE.md project structure section." CLAUDE.md must be added to Section 2.3 for internal consistency.

ACTION REQUIRED: Add CLAUDE.md to Section 2.3 "Files Affected" and re-route for review.

QA Pre-Review (Re-Review) — CR-109

DETERMINATION: COMPLIANT — Recommend Approval

PRIOR FINDING DISPOSITION:
- Finding 1 (Internal inconsistency, Section 2.3 vs 7.2 vs EI-4): RESOLVED. Section 2.3 now includes "CLAUDE.md - Update project structure section" (line 30), consistent with Section 7.2 (line 101) and EI-4 (line 192).

FULL VERIFICATION:
- Frontmatter title: "Add qms-workflow-engine submodule under formal change control" (present, non-empty)
- Frontmatter revision_summary: "Initial draft" (present, acceptable for initial draft)
- All required CR sections present (1-12), correctly numbered
- No prohibited placeholder content (TBD/TODO/FIXME/XXX) in pre-approved sections (1-9, 12)
- Section 2.3 Files Affected now consistent with Section 7.1/7.2 and EI table
- Current state accurately reflects four existing submodules (verified against .gitmodules)
- Implementation Plan (6 steps) maps 1:1 to EI table (6 EIs)
- Testing summary adequate for infrastructure-only CR (procedural verification)
- VR flags correctly absent (no behavioral changes)
- References relevant and accurate
- Formatting consistent throughout; no typos or errors found

All review criteria satisfied. Document is ready for approval.

QA Post-Review — CR-109

DETERMINATION: COMPLIANT — Recommend Approval

PRE-APPROVED CONTENT INTEGRITY:
- Sections 1-9 and 12: verified identical to v1.0 archive via diff (zero differences). Pre-approved content was not modified during execution.

EXECUTION ITEM VERIFICATION:

EI-1 (Pre-execution baseline): Pass. Commit 26302a0 verified in git log — "CR-109 pre-execution baseline: session init, CR pre-approved v1.0". Traceable evidence present.

EI-2 (Create GitHub repo): Pass. Initial commit 7731a8d cited. Independently verified — submodule pointer on disk matches this hash (git submodule status: 7731a8d96e16f8722405981a13d9a1b8ce640949).

EI-3 (Add submodule): Pass. git submodule status confirms all five submodules clean and initialized. qms-workflow-engine registered at 7731a8d.

EI-4 (Update CLAUDE.md): Pass. Execution comment transparently documents that pre-existing omissions of claude-qms and Quality-Manual were corrected alongside the new qms-workflow-engine entry. This is within the task description scope ("Update CLAUDE.md project structure section") — the structure was factually inaccurate and was corrected as part of the update. Documentation of the scope note in Execution Comments is proper procedure.

EI-5 (Verify integration): Pass. Three-part verification documented. Independently confirmed: (1) qms-workflow-engine/ contains README.md and .gitignore only (ls verified), (2) git submodule status shows all five submodules healthy with no dirty/uninitialized markers, (3) existing submodule hashes present and unchanged.

EI-6 (Post-execution state): Pass. Commit d474951 verified in git log — "CR-109 executed: qms-workflow-engine submodule added". Traceable evidence present.

ADDITIONAL CHECKS:
- All 6/6 EIs have recorded outcomes (Pass) with traceable evidence
- No VR-flagged EIs (none expected for infrastructure CR)
- No child documents (VARs, ERs)
- Execution Comments populated with EI-4 scope note (properly documented)
- Execution Summary (Section 11) filled in, accurately reflects execution
- No residual placeholder content in execution fields
- Formatting consistent; no typos or errors found

All post-review criteria satisfied. Document is ready for post-approval.
